belier.intro: Sunday's solar day lights up your hours with a joyful warmth, dear Aries. The Sun in Gemini keeps moving through your zone of exchanges and stimulates your bright curiosity. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of intimate depths, an invitation to go beneath the surface.
belier.love: Venus colors your bonds with a new depth, and you can dare a sincere word that truly touches the heart. In a relationship, a shared moment away from the noise can revive a precious intensity. If single, an encounter may take on a deeper flavor than expected when you let yourself be truly seen.
belier.work: Mars, your ruler, supports your drive, and the Sunday Sun also invites you to savor what you are building. A discussion around shared finances or a joint project can move forward if you listen to the real stakes. You have the chance to transform an old tension into a lever for growth.
belier.energy: Your body asks today for a blend of activity and rest, without excess. Favor a walk in fresh air or a gentle session that awakens without draining you.
belier.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in the shadow areas you are finally willing to look at. A lingering sensation can carry a true message if you grant it some silence.
belier.mantra: I dive within to grow toward the sky
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: Sunday's solar day invites you to savor simple pleasures, dear Taurus. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of resources and nourishes your bond to what truly enriches you. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of partnerships, an invitation to meet others in their truth.
taureau.love: Venus, your ruler, supports a deeper attention for those who matter to you. In a relationship, a frank conversation led with softness can clear a point that was left hanging. If single, you can feel an unexpected magnetism toward someone who is nothing like you.
taureau.work: You have the chance to move forward on a partnership project where your steadiness makes the difference. A professional exchange can take a more engaging turn, accept to give of yourself without sacrificing your core. Avoid clinging to an old habit, a new way of doing things can open a horizon.
taureau.energy: Your kidneys and throat appreciate good hydration and a posture both upright and at ease. A full back stretch can release tensions gathered through the week.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition flows today through others and the way they look at you. A word received, even brief, can light up an angle that was still escaping you.
taureau.mantra: I open myself to the richness of true meeting
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun continues its course in your sign, dear Gemini, and this solar Sunday celebrates your radiant season. Mercury, your ruler, supports your liveliness of mind and your taste for ideas that circulate freely. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of daily life and body, an invitation to honor what carries you day by day.
gemeaux.love: Venus colors your bonds with a warmer and more joyful vibration today. In a relationship, sharing a relaxed moment without an agenda can revive a precious lightness. If single, you have the chance to cross paths with someone in a festive or sunny setting, and the current may flow naturally.
gemeaux.work: You can make the most of this Sunday to prepare your week with care and pleasure. An idea born in recent days deserves a small moment of organizing to take shape. Avoid scattering yourself, choose the angle that truly makes you vibrate today.
gemeaux.energy: Your body asks for a balanced rhythm between playful activity and a true pause. Preserve a quiet time away from screens to let your mind breathe fully.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in the small daily gestures done with real presence. A routine lived differently can bring you a clarity more precise than long analysis.
gemeaux.mantra: I celebrate the light of my season
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of retreat, dear Cancer, and this solar Sunday supports a beautiful time for yourself. The Moon, your ruler, waxing, glides toward Scorpio in your creative and romantic zone. A warm and magnetic vibration can move through your day with finesse.
cancer.love: Your heart opens today to a more joyful and embodied intensity. In a relationship, a playful shared moment can revive a tender and sensual complicity. If single, you have the chance to notice someone who awakens an unexpected creative spark in you.
cancer.work: You can use this Sunday to give free rein to a creative project that you hold dear. An idea born from a hobby can become the seed of a larger future. Avoid judging yourself too quickly, let inspiration take shape at its own rhythm.
cancer.energy: Your stomach and heart appreciate a meal shared in good company. A creative activity like cooking, painting, or gardening can nourish your energy subtly.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition reveals itself in what makes you vibrate without an obvious reason. An impulse toward a color, a piece of music, or a place can carry a precious message for you.
cancer.mantra: My joy is a precious compass
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: Sunday, day of the Sun, your ruler, fully celebrates your royal sign, dear Leo. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of friendships and your collective projects. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of home, an invitation to take care of your intimate space.
lion.love: Venus colors your heart with a sincere warmth that radiates around you. In a relationship, building a cozy cocoon at home can nourish your bond with a tender depth. If single, you can feel drawn to someone met in a familial or close friendly setting.
lion.work: You have the chance to set down your ambition a little to take care of your roots today. A project tied to your home, your office, or your inner organization can move forward by a fine step. Avoid chasing the spotlight at all costs, solar rest is also a source of power.
lion.energy: Your heart appreciates a calm rhythm and simple pleasures that warm you up. A moment in the sun or a meal savored without rush can fully recharge your energy.
lion.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the silence of your home and in the memories that rise. A dream, an image, or a buried emotion can carry a precious truth to welcome.
lion.mantra: I shine from the warmth of my roots
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: Sunday's solar day invites you to breathe wider and freer, dear Virgo. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your professional zone and nourishes your quiet ambitions. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of close exchanges, an invitation to speak with more depth.
vierge.love: Venus colors your bonds with a fair and kind attention. In a relationship, a conversation held without masks can strengthen the trust between you. If single, you have the chance to cross paths with someone in your neighborhood or close circle, and the exchange may take on a surprising flavor.
vierge.work: You can use this Sunday to put on paper the ideas that have been jostling since the week began. A writing, presentation, or transmission project can take shape today with pleasure. Avoid wanting to analyze everything, leave room as well for the practical intuition that defines you.
vierge.energy: Your belly and intestines appreciate simple eating and a true moment of calm digestion. A gentle walk after a meal can harmonize your energy with finesse.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in words spoken or read with attention. A sentence heard by chance can light up a larger inner question.
vierge.mantra: My words translate my truth with softness
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: Sunday's solar day lays a warm light over your day, dear Libra. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of expansion and nourishes your wish for new horizons. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of resources, an invitation to clarify what truly nourishes you.
balance.love: Venus, your ruler, colors your bonds with a more rooted elegance today. In a relationship, a moment of sensual and concrete attention can strengthen your shared intimacy. If single, you can feel drawn to someone who offers you a soft and engaging stability.
balance.work: You have the chance to reflect calmly on what truly rewards you, both financially and humanly. A project tied to the value of your work can clarify a coming orientation. Avoid making a decision in a rush, let your reflection ripen with calm.
balance.energy: Your kidneys and lower back appreciate good hydration and gentle stretches. Favor sensory pleasures that ground you without weighing you down.
balance.intuition: Your intuition sharpens in your relationship to the concrete and to what you touch. A physical sensation, a scent, or a texture can bring you useful information to welcome.
balance.mantra: I discern with calm what truly nourishes me
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: Sunday's solar day lights up your day with a joyful warmth, dear Scorpio. The Sun in Gemini keeps illuminating your zone of partnerships and nourishes your deep exchanges. The waxing Moon enters your sign and amplifies your sensitivity and magnetism today.
scorpion.love: Venus colors your bonds with a magnetic intensity that vibrates particularly strongly. In a relationship, your aura touches your partner just right, and a shared moment can take on an unforgettable flavor. If single, you can draw glances without even seeking them, your radiance speaks for you.
scorpion.work: You have the chance to cast a lucid gaze on your true professional aspirations. A duo project can move forward by a step if you accept to share the reins fairly. Avoid wanting to control everything, your strength today also comes from your capacity to let things be.
scorpion.energy: Your energy is powerful yet sensitive, listen to the signs of your body with care. A moment in water, bath or swim, can soothe you and recenter your emotions.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition is particularly sharp today and perceives the invisible with clarity. Trust your first feeling, it often carries the most precious truth.
scorpion.mantra: My deep feeling lights my true path
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: Sunday's solar day invites you to breathe wide and savor the freedom of the day, dear Sagittarius. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of partnerships and nourishes your dialogue with the other. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of inner retreat, an invitation to honor your need for silence.
sagittaire.love: Venus colors your bonds with a tender depth that may surprise you today. In a relationship, a moment of intimacy away from the outer world can strengthen your complicity in an unexpected way. If single, you can feel drawn to someone discreet who touches a secret part of you.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to step back from your ongoing projects to better perceive their meaning. A reflective pause can bring you a clarity more precious than a fresh rushed action. Avoid committing to too many horizons at once, choose the one that resonates most within you.
sagittaire.energy: Your thighs and hips appreciate a soft and free movement, without constraint. A moment of meditation or restorative yoga can harmonize your energy in depth.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition reveals itself in the silence and retreat you grant yourself today. A dream, a fleeting image, or a deep emotion can carry a precious message.
sagittaire.mantra: Silence opens my most beautiful revelations
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: Sunday's solar day invites you to let some softness into your seriousness, dear Capricorn. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of daily life and nourishes your thinking on your organization. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of friendships, an invitation to connect with those who truly resemble you.
capricorne.love: Venus colors your bonds with a tender and complicit friendship today. In a relationship, sharing a project or a hobby together can strengthen your complicity in a precious way. If single, you have the chance to notice someone in your close circle that you had not seen from this angle.
capricorne.work: You can use this Sunday to exchange with people who share your deep ambitions. A conversation with a friend can light up a professional project that is taking shape within you. Avoid staying alone with your reflections, the echo of another can move your thinking forward.
capricorne.energy: Your knees and bones appreciate a regular and structured movement. Preserve a time of warm conviviality, your energy is also nourished by the human bond.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition wakes up in contact with a group or a trusted friend. A word heard in a friendly exchange can echo further than you might believe.
capricorne.mantra: My bonds nourish my greatest ambitions
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: Sunday's solar day lights up your day with a warm and inspiring glow, dear Aquarius. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your creative zone and nourishes your taste for what makes you vibrate. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your professional zone, an invitation to embody your ambition with depth.
verseau.love: Venus colors your bonds with an intense and magnetic vibration today. In a relationship, a shared project mixing ambition and complicity can strengthen your bond in a new way. If single, you can cross paths with someone in a professional or public setting and the resonance may surprise you.
verseau.work: You have the chance to reflect serenely on the deep direction you want to give your path. A professional project that you hold dear can take on a clearer dimension today. Avoid being distracted by outer pressures, listen to your inner voice.
verseau.energy: Your ankles and nervous system appreciate a calm rhythm and regular pauses. A creative movement like free dance can release an energy that was seeking to come out.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition reveals itself in your relationship to what surpasses you and pulls you upward. A spontaneous vision of your future can carry a true message to honor.
verseau.mantra: I sculpt my future with heart and vision
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: Sunday's solar day invites you to open your horizon and let your imagination breathe, dear Pisces. The Sun in Gemini keeps lighting your zone of home and nourishes your need for a cocoon. The waxing Moon glides toward Scorpio in your zone of travel and expansion, an invitation to widen your gaze on life.
poissons.love: Venus colors your bonds with a poetic depth that is particularly touching today. In a relationship, a conversation about your dreams and long-term projects can strengthen your spiritual complicity. If single, you can feel drawn to someone from elsewhere or carrying a different culture.
poissons.work: You have the chance to reflect on a larger project that would grow you. A training, a professional trip, or an expanding encounter can germinate today. Avoid limiting yourself to your usual frame, the horizon is calling you with softness.
poissons.energy: Your feet and whole body appreciate a fluid movement like swimming or dancing. A moment of reverie in open air can fully recharge your subtle energy.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is particularly wide today and welcomes the signs of the world with finesse. A book, a meeting, or a distant image can carry a message rich with meaning.
poissons.mantra: My horizon widens at the rhythm of my dreams
poissons.author: Sibylle
